utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: - health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance, monthly costs, plan names, family scope, quality ratings, and included features. Meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' - property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with monthly cost, plan name, replacement value coverage, and a sublimit for TV/entertainment. Meets 'home/contents insurance with costs.' - travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance with monthly cost, plan name, family scope, coverage areas (Europe/USA), and included features (pre-existing conditions, premium medical limits, concierge). Meets 'travel insurance with costs.' - additional_services: Specifies telemedicine services with monthly cost and features. Meets 'any enhancement services with costs.' - total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown and additional commentary. Meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) Physical health via LifeFirst Standard Physical Health and (2) Mental health via HealthFirst Standard Mental Health; (3) Home/contents via LifeFirst Standard Coverage; (4) Travel via LifeFirst Standard Plan; (5) Telemedicine services as an add-on. From the ground truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 8 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 6 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home_content) has rating 8. LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel_insurance) has rating 7. Telemedicine Services (health_enhancement_services) has rating 9.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical and mental health insurance: €640/month (LifeFirst Standard Physical Health €400/month for family of 4, HealthFirst Standard Mental Health €240/month for family of 4) with 4-star quality, 8.0-8.5/10 ratings, includes telemedicine, gym reimbursement, chronic condition management for hypertension/cholesterol and asthma",
    "property_coverage": "Home/contents insurance: €60/month (LifeFirst Standard Coverage with replacement value coverage and TV/entertainment insurance up to €1000)",
    "travel_coverage": "Travel insurance: €200/month (LifeFirst Standard Plan for family of 4, covers pre-existing conditions, premium medical limits, concierge services for Europe/USA travel)",
    "additional_services": "Telemedicine services: €40/month for family of 4 (24/7 virtual consultations, prescription delivery, excellent for managing chronic conditions while traveling)",
    "total_budget": "Complete monthly cost: €940/month total (€45 under €985 budget target). Annual cost: €11,280. Represents €345/month savings from current health insurance spending while adding comprehensive travel coverage and maintaining property protection. No setup fees or administrative charges."
}
